title: Iran’s Former Leader Denies Times Report
summary_full: The Times reported that Israel had planned to reinstall Mahmoud Ahmadinejad as Iran’s leader after the war.
summary_public: The Times reported that Israel had planned to reinstall Mahmoud Ahmadinejad as Iran’s leader after the war.
